note: Conservative GENERIC associations only — no crop-specific epidemiological claims. Weights are configurable by agronomy reviewers; every score change must show prior→new with source status and freshness.

moistureSensitiveDiseaseRisk.description: Elevated rainfall forecast or high relative humidity generically raises suitability conditions for moisture-sensitive foliar disease clusters.

warningDrivenUrgency.description: Official warning levels raise operational urgency of clusters in the warned district.

windRainFieldAccessRisk.description: High wind or heavy rain degrades field-mission access — reported as operational context, NOT added to the outbreak score.

stateMultiplierNote: Fallback or sample-derived weather moves the score LESS than official IMD data; SIMULATED_WEATHER never moves the score (multiplier 0 → prior kept, explanation still shown).
